arts.ttl: Marching On Together: The Story Behind Leeds United’s Anthem
arts.sum: Revie’s team were at the height of their powers in the early 1970s, competing for domestic and European honours, and the club wanted anthems to match their ambition, and the end result of that Cup Final helped consolidate the legacy of a song still going strong to this day. Initially, MOT was released as the B-side of another record released in 1972, the A-side being titled “Leeds United”, performed by the Leeds United squad and supporters – a song honouring the famous side managed by Revie with 12 iconic mainstays of the squad all named, that tune now being obviously lesser known than it’s B-side, but still cherished by the fans.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Ex DoF Victor Orta slated in Spanish media
arts.sum: It’s been almost two years since Victor Orta left his position as Leeds United’s director of football, heading to his beloved Sevilla where he’s had similar fortunes. An advantage they had is that they had a big opportunity to ensure they weren’t nearly as bad in managing the club’s position as Leeds’ previous owner Andrea Radrizzani, who tarnished his reputation alongside his controversial director of football Victor Orta, whose decisions are attributed as one of the key reasons Leeds tumbled out of the top flight.

arts.ttl: Sam Allardyce gives honest Leeds United promotion assessment as double worry outlined
arts.sum: Former Leeds United manager Sam Allardyce has urged the Whites to avoid slipping into the play-offs again this season as the Premier League promotion race goes down to the wire in the Championship. "I think that obviously a Leeds United in the Premier League will be great to see, of course.

arts.ttl: Leeds have major advantage in promotion race despite last season's collapse
arts.sum: Leeds United fans wishing to forget the trauma of last season's Wembley heartache were soon reminded by rivals about what's on the line when they drew consecutive fixtures to Swansea City and Luton Town. In the last five fixtures last season, the Whites managed to pick up just four points from a possible 15.

arts.sum: Luton Town forward Elijah Adebayo has undergone surgery after suffering ACL damage and will be out for several… The post Luton Town confirm serious injury suffered by 27-year-old in Leeds United draw appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Championship: Predictions for all 12 weekend games
arts.sum: The finishing line is coming into view in the Championship but there remains plenty to play for as Aaron Ashley previews all 12 games in the second tier this weekend.

arts.ttl: Danny Murphy drops new promotion verdict involving Leeds United, Burnley and Sheffield United
arts.sum: Speaking on talkSPORT following the latest round of fixtures in the second tier of English football, former Liverpool midfielder and England international Danny Murphy has backed the Whites to win the title. Leeds United put themselves back in the driving seat for automatic promotion after returning to winning ways at Middlesbrough in midweek.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke set for more referee fury after confirmed Leeds United v Preston news
arts.sum: Daniel Farke’s regard of EFL officiating is likely at the lowest point it’s ever been after two awful offside decisions on Tuesday, but Leeds United’s clash with Preston will be refereed by another unpopular figure. Official confirmed for Leeds United v Preston – he took charge of controversial reverse fixture

arts.ttl: What Leeds United need to do in their last five matches to be promoted to the Premier League
arts.sum: Ninety-eight points would be needed in this scenario meaning that Leeds would need to secure four victories and a draw from their final five matches to guarantee promotion to the Premier League. Currently, Leeds fans should be hoping that Burnley beat Sheffield United to give themselves the best chance of promotion to the Premier League.
